name: totp-webapp
description: TOTP-WebApp is a self-hosted, offline-first TOTP authenticator web app with encrypted local vault storage and optional encrypted cloud sync.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/crypto && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/crypto && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
